label: Middle Eastern context — Ramadan-aware food channel

input.niche: Home cooking and traditional recipes from across the Middle East and North Africa
input.frequency: Three times a week (Sunday, Tuesday, Thursday)
ideas: Iftar meal prep for working parents
Regional variations of kunafa across five countries
The science behind perfect falafel
How to stock a Middle Eastern pantry on a budget
One-pot Ramadan suhoor recipes
Eid al-Fitr feast planning guide
Street food recreations at home
input.fixed_dates: Month includes the final two weeks of Ramadan and Eid al-Fitr. Content must respect the rhythm of fasting — no daytime eating content during Ramadan; iftar and suhoor content timed appropriately.
input.best_performers: Recipe tutorials with cultural history context and holiday meal planning videos
input.constraints: Thumbnails and titles must avoid imagery that could be seen as disrespectful during the holy month. No clickbait around fasting or weight loss.

label: African context — multi-country social media presence

input.niche: Pan-African tech startup culture and entrepreneurship stories
ideas: Founder spotlight: building a fintech in a cash-first economy
Why Lagos and Nairobi are not the only tech hubs
Lessons from failed startups nobody talks about

input.best_performers: Founder interview clips and myth-busting videos about African markets
input.constraints: Audience spans Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana, and Rwanda. Time zones, languages (English and French-speaking audiences), and platform preferences (YouTube dominates in some markets, TikTok in others) vary. Content must resonate across multiple national contexts without defaulting to a single country's perspective.

label: East Asian context — content navigating platform restrictions

Working with non-professional subjects ethically

Editing rhythms that keep viewers watching
input.fixed_dates: Week 4 aligns with an international short film festival submission deadline — content should reference festival preparation
input.best_performers: Practical technique tutorials with before-and-after examples
input.constraints: Creator publishes on both international platforms (YouTube) and a domestic platform with content moderation guidelines that restrict certain political and social topics. Calendar must ensure no content triggers review or removal on the domestic platform. Topics must focus on craft and technique rather than subject matter that could be flagged. No explicit references to censorship itself.
